title: Arlong’s Rule Tightens Around Nami
scene: On pages 5–8, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. The scale of Arlong’s rule becomes clearer as the fish-men dominate the island and its people.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Oh? An inferior human dares slight me...? I'll forgive you just this once but don't you ever call us half-fish again!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: We fishmen are "evolved humans" who have gained the ability to breathe in the sea.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: With our abilities, we're beings of a higher order than you puny humans!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Our innate strength which far exceeds that of humans is very proof of that!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: In short, we are "Lords of Creation!" Get that through your dense head!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: And so, a human who defies a fishman,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: is essentially defying the "Divine Provi- Pence of Nature!"

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I'm sick of hearing you blah on about that stupid pet theory of yours,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Arlong.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: NA...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: No need to make such a scary face, Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You're a different case, of course!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong Pirates
dialogue.text: you're the ARLONG Pirates' prized "Cartographer."

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: You make the most accurate nautical charts!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Of course!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: my brain's of a much "Higher order" than any of yours!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: CartogR- apher...!? Hey, Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Chew
dialogue.text: Why the hell are you so chummy with these guys for...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What, are you two acquain- tances?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Don't be silly,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He's just one of my victims.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I was able to swindle a huge fortune from these guys during my most recent haul.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I knew you guys were chasing after me to a certain point,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But to think you'd actually make it here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Is this your true self?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: That's right.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Surprised?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong Pirates
dialogue.text: I'm an officer of the ARLONG Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I was already a pirate when we met.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Shaha haha! She had you completely strung- Arlong!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This girl right here would do anything for the sake of money. Even forget the death of her own parent!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: She's a real gold- blogded witch!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Tricking people to swindle them is like her second nature!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Moreover, she's got us as her backup!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I see...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Well, it's not like I really trusted her anyways.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: wouldn't surprise me even if she turned out to be a devilish cutthroat.

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
